film.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street
film.overview: The infamous story of Benjamin Barker, a.k.a Sweeney Todd, who sets up a barber shop down in London which is the basis for a sinister partnership with his fellow tenant, Mrs. Lovett. Based on the hit Broadway musical.

dialogues.dialogue: Ladies and gentlemen  May I have your attention, please?  Do you wake every morning In shame and despair  To discover your pillow Is covered with hair?  What ought not to be there
Oh, yeah. Of course we could do that.  Don't suppose he's got any relatives gonna come looking for him.  Seems a downright shame  Shame?  Seems an awful waste
